name: research_ethics_sensor_fusion_marrowbridge_tru_loy
premise: A Research Ethics response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving research ethics sensor fusion marrowbridge tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Darius Reed
agents.identity: I am Darius Reed, accountable for a defensible call in Research Ethics when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Darius Mensah
agents.identity: I am Darius Mensah, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Research Ethics.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Darius Reed must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Darius Reed do?
